integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the genuine Sygic GPS Navigation GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual Sygic app interface, not a text editor, browser, or a different mock application.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass UI navigation.

integrity.description: Verify that any displayed 'Power saving' settings appear to be native to the app and not fabricated.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI elements for the setting match the design language, font, and layout of the rest of the Sygic application without signs of image manipulation or text injection.

privileged_info_for_vlm: CRITICAL FACT: This task is technically impossible in the provided version of Sygic GPS Navigation (v26.0.2). Exhaustive analysis confirms that neither 'Battery management' nor 'Power saving' menus or settings exist in this version of the app. All battery-related strings refer strictly to Electric Vehicle (EV) features. Therefore, the agent cannot legitimately complete steps 3, 4, or 5. Any screenshots appearing to show these specific settings are likely from a different app, a hallucination, or spoofed. Score strictly based on visual evidence, but be highly skeptical of any purported success for the later steps.
